textByHash.e4c73c66705939032a7eb4ea0b1e1b26bbd5f850: We're out of the maze now. Please hurry, we must have the orb if we are to survive.
textByHash.91563cd1e50919136eeb208d7c941d9c2f660170: The orb, they have the orb. We're doomed. Do you need me to show you through the maze?
textByHash.f1a5538c3b71b8357abfca477aeb90b7cff6c256: Please help us get our orb back.
textByHash.86866a231b6a34787b5009602700cff97344163c: The orb, they have the orb. We're doomed. Do you need me to show you back to the village?
textByHash.d6b103b196e35badf99ad5c520528264d1d87e8b: You must retrieve the orb, or the gnome village is doomed. Do you need me to show you through the maze?
textByHash.0f8d458e4b4892d94163dc858deb95936bb53ebd: Please, we must have the orb if we are to survive. Do you need me to show you through the maze?
textByHash.b35a3fbad3c7357f74451719fb99359ce7bcbca1: You're our saviour. Please return it to the village and we are all saved. Would you like me to show you the way to the village?
textByHash.72ffe02c365778240b2f61a00779cbdc3e9ab97d: Here we are. Take the orb to King Bolren, I'm sure he'll be pleased to see you.
textByHash.eb97ebe0e3ec164f13213ba59116099d8864f3d4: Please, we must have the orb if we are to survive.
textByHash.a4707de4bf7f007b40007760cd5830b0e2c34ec4: Take it to King Bolren, I'm sure he'll be pleased to see you.
textByHash.c5d6b2b4c551af8db30ef17252f3b04503b5b1d2: Please return with our orb soon.
textByHash.a9c612fed74705747b95dc2cd6cf0bdf5a9c583f: Khazard's men have pillaged the village! They slaughtered many, and took the other orbs in an attempt to lead us out of the maze. When will the misery end?
textByHash.da7646c11fdcdb6bf6c07de6262b5a8abc624437: Please help us find the orbs.
textByHash.9a0ddd94a457fbfe8d116679647334c91fb732ea: Would you like me to show you the way to the village?
textByHash.1896b43596cd47ccc205b979f226d4fbed11da5b: Here we are. Despite what has happened here, I hope you feel welcome.
textByHash.be777128669a98a6c498450746b6b92bed69ded1: You saved us by returning the orbs of protection. I'm humbled and wish you well.
textByHash.2573320607048f5cf2fa7ed9e00d6b7bc0c274d7: Here we are. Feel free to have a look around.
textByHash.c78006a731c2a2142b0d7f23cd87c9b9202268d1: You saved us by returning the orbs of protection. I'm humbled and wish you well. Would you like me to show you through the maze?
textByHash.3d44b4675d599b012646b66bf53b75774c255c0d: Here we are. Have a safe journey.
textByHash.dc6ac77b725adf93cb55eacbaee05cf88699e53d: Hello, welcome to our maze. I'm Elkoy the tree gnome.
textByHash.7d5042cf85804f25aaaeaea6bcde4ba5457dc9ff: There's not many of us left. Once you could find tree gnomes anywhere in the world, now we hide in small groups to avoid capture.
textByHash.596c8ae379e1385dc5f218bebd881d641812e73a: Tree gnomes have been hunted for so called 'fun' since as long as I can remember.
textByHash.f878a1195746defc7aaccc418e40f9b305dd3939: Our main threat nowadays are General Khazard's troops. They know no mercy, but are also very dense. They'll never find their way through our maze.
textByHash.05e65c31d102e6fdbce9fe5cf88b9b1edddf04b7: Hello, welcome to our village. I'm Elkoy the tree gnome.
textByHash.dd0844f15e5a37da44949a363c8c8d88f8da3867: Hi there, I hope life is treating you well. Would you like me to show you the way to the village?
textByHash.3734f5655ddadf7e90b3279de98de823a03ace58: Hi there, I hope life is treating you well. Would you like me to show you the way out of the village?
